title: Favorite least favorite shots
wikitext:
[]: Favorite/least favorite shots [SPOILERS, naturally]             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Sep 21, 2009 2:16 am Just what the title says: which were your favorite/least favorite shots/scenes in 2.0? Granted, it's kinda unfair to ask such a thing at this point, since most of us haven't yet experienced this stuff in it's full visual glory, but one can always make some premture assessments. Naturally, everything is just IMHO. Favorites: Basically anything that involved the Mark06, however, if i had to choose, my two favorite scenes would be the final scene (the real final scene, after the credits) and the lingering shots of the Evas after the Sahaquiel battle. What can i say? Long pans and tilts on the Evas combined with a beat up landscape always win me over. These scenes were also refreshing to me because they showed the Evas in the open without "Final Destiny of Doooom!" screaming in the background. Nothing specifically wrong with the soundtrack, but it could get a little overbearing at times. The eerie silence aided the "Kaworu cometh" scene especially well. Least favorites: Sadly, the candidates for this title were more numerous than in the other category. Basically every comedic scene (except for the Kaji/Shinji one, just for it's pure outlandishness) had me groaning rather than chuckling. And i still uphold that the silliness in 2.0 was used like a blunt weapon, without any sense of style. But, if i had to pick the absolute downers: -Eva-01 growing an A.T. field arm: the Awakening scene up to that point was glorious. Sure, glowing red eye Shinji was a tad strange, but wasn't totally murderous. And i definitely liked the way the neon green stripes on Sho started to glow red. The scene where she pulled Zeruel in for a close-up was awesome. Then came that orange monstrosity of an arm and... my libido was killled. And to rub salt in the wound: A.T. FIELD ROCKET PUNCH! That single moment completely destroyed the Eva-feel of that scene. I could not be bothered by the over-the-top-ness that followed because i just couldn't take things seriously anymore. The Third Impact/Ayanami Rescue scene that followed suit was cool, but i found it strange when people said that it gave them instantaneous EoE flashbacks: to me, everything but EoE came to mind, exactly because we had two solid minutes (that's without counting Beast Mode Eva-02) of "Tengenn Toppa Diebustgelion Z" inserted just before. I'm seriously hoping that the AWESOME!!!-ness of 2.0 will be subverted in the following installments in some way or another, or at least the Shining A.T. Field Powa moments will be combined with more classic, feral, visceral Eva action. Granted, i know that we had that with Eva-03, and varietas delectat , but God, stop being so over the top, Rebuild. -Second Impact Flashback: yeah, this is one of the few scenes where the original beats Rebuild by miles. Sure, inserting the original form of the Misato flashback sequence would have been pretty jarring after the lighthearted aquarium scenes (not to mention that this time it's Kaji through whom we get to this scene), but "cartoony Misato with Scary Big Adams and Kare Kano piano theme" just doesn't hold a candle to the originals dread and plain coolness (and THAT soundeffect was sorely missed). And IMHO, though it is nice to see it sorta "come to life" when Eva-01 transcends, this scene fails on it's own too, not just when backtracking is applied. It's just not enough. Also before the inevitable arguments: i find it funny that when someone complains about changes, the defenders immediately jump in to proclaim that "It's different, it's an alternate canon and blah blah blah", but when someone says "Well, it could have been less xplosive/silly" then those same defenders retaliate with "THE ORIGINAL WAS SILLY TOO, THIS IS THE ACTION ARC, STFU!". I didn't mean to offend anyone, but i feel a certain dichotomy there. EDIT: Of course, i'm not against arguments per se , just make it less of the "Quit whining!" and more of the "Well, to me it worked because/it added to/etc." type. 


[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Mon Sep 21, 2009 9:39 pm Favorites: -Shinji stomping on the NERV building. IRL trolling in its finest form. -Unit 01 duking it out with Zeruel and Shinji saving teh Rei (Or pretty much the last 30 minutes as a whole, if I wanted to generalize that a bit since the ending of the movie was fantastic). -Asuka and Shinji overall being more tolerable as a hole in this movie. Shinji didn't come off as indecisive, yet he wasn't like his manga counterpart who seems to whine about Asuka every chance he gets. Asuka whom while keeping her classic lines was able to be overall much more likeable. -Improved character interaction. Shinji and Rei I don't even really need to comment on, but its also worth noting that Shinji has some interesting scenes of dialogue between both Kaji and Asuka in this movie. -ANYTHING involving Kaworu. He's my favorite character and if he's getting more screen time than thats awesome. Least Favorites: -Unit 03's pilot :/ Not out of Asuka fanboyism or dislike towards Mari, but it really just doesn't seem to fit to me. -Fanservicey scenes were a waste of perfectly good screen time. With the time that could be spent focusing say, maybe a scene of Ritsuko explaining the history of Magi and her mother to Misato over a cup of coffee or something like that, they wasted it on Asuka leaping out of the shower after seeing Pen Pen or the decontamination scene. -Exclusion of S2 Organs as this was a MAJOR plot point in the original. -4 Adams? lol wut? Not a huge thing to complain about but it kind of takes away from the concept of Adam being this one epic giant of light. -Eva Unit 05 doesn't even LOOK like an Eva, nor does it function like one. -Mari hasn't really contributed anything Asuka or Misato couldn't have. She's an okay character, and her Eva fights were pretty neat looking, but she seems kinda generic and thrown together, but maybe she'll be explained more in 3.0. Third edit, lol : Hell train in 2.0 was fucking sweet. Forgot to mention that.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Sep 21, 2009 9:41 pm Favorite: -Asuka being in Bardiel -Mari piloting Unit-02 -Mari activating ZA BEAST -Every scene with Mari -Shinji trying to save Rei Least favorite Mari doing what Asuka did in the beginning of the Zuruel fight but she totally made up for it by going into beast mode.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Sep 21, 2009 9:45 pm I thought these were individual SHOTS? Not plot scenes or elements One of my favorites- The shot when the Core Creature in Sahaquiel unfolds and extends its arms out to Eva 01. LOVE IT! Least favorite- Camera going straight up into Asuka's crotch when she's turning over in bed. There's fan service and then there's just being overtly distracting.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:41 pm Favorites: -Sequence of Shinji walking to school, and Maya to work. Daily life & nature. -Za Biisato! -Hell train! -camerawork after 9th Angel battle. -Asuka & Shinji post-9th Angel and Shinji saving Rei sequences. -3rd Angel battle! Least: -AT Field rocket punch, nuff said. -Asuka night-time crotch shot. lolwtf. -Kaji's Engrish.

[]:             Quote Post by UltraBlackPilot » Mon Sep 21, 2009 10:49 pm Favorite Zeruel kicking ass and taking names Least favorite Eva 04 explosion

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Fri Sep 25, 2009 9:08 pm Favourite: 1: 2 (can't be effectively screencapped): The instant Zeruel bursts into a 3d spatter, floating in the middle of a cloud of debris. Least Favourite: Noting comes to mind really.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Sep 26, 2009 12:33 am -Second Impact indie sorta bit -Kaji/Shinji my faves

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Sep 27, 2009 3:59 pm Favorites: ZA BEASTO. Kaworu impaling Shinji on his Lance. "Give Ayanami back..." Anything involving Bardiel or Zeruel. Least Favorites Anything involving the pilots and fanservice. (For Adam's sake, the girls are only 14...) Kaji deciding to play gay chicken with Shinji. (Ick.) Gendo's scenes (The sooner he dies, the better.)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Sep 27, 2009 7:06 pm Favorites Mari going berserk against zeruel.This was awsome. Unit 01 going berserk and doing all the awsome things it did against Zeruel.This was awsome too.Way awsome. PenPen passed out under Misato's shirt.This was just funny. Least Favorites The bardiel fight.Only hated it because of the music that was used when Unit 01 was activated on the dummy system.Didnt fit. And that's all from me ;) .

[]:             Quote Post by squall.leonhart » Sun Sep 27, 2009 11:49 pm Eva 04 wrote: Least Favorites The bardiel fight.Only hated it because of the music that was used when Unit 01 was activated on the dummy system.Didnt fit.

[]:             Quote Post by EdZ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 9:49 am How could I forget Clockiel smashing up the JMSDF:

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Sep 29, 2009 10:31 am Favorites: Gendo's SSTO ride to the moon, all Eva-06/Kaworu scenes, particularly the way Eva-06 arrives on Earth. Having Eva-06 and Kaworu with the moon behind them is beautiful in an eerie, haunting sort of way. They're probably the only really good scenes in 2.0, which is sad. :( Least: A whole lot of them, particularly Shinji and Mari getting glowing eyes, the entire rotten Zeruel battle and the overall stupidity of 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 1:29 pm Okay... other than Kaji taking the Key of Nebuchadnezzar, what was the point of this scene?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Sep 29, 2009 1:37 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Okay... other than Kaji taking the Key of Nebuchadnezzar, what was the point of this scene?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Sep 29, 2009 4:10 pm I know the things that bothered me are generally different from those that bothered other people, but how is the AT Field "rocket punch" any more over the top than anything that's been done with the AT Field prior to that pont, especially by Rebuild Zeruel? Using the AT Field offensively was fine up to the point when it formed an arm? Remember that AT Fields have two purposes, and one of those purposes is holding the form of one's body. And remember that it's possible to change one's appearance by changing the contents of one's heart, so regenerating the arm as an AT Field arm that could also be used offensively just seemed like a natural combination of the AT Field's two aspects. Anyway, favorites include Beast Mode, the very little we get to see of Clockiel (not counting Unit 02's midair acrobatics), and practically everything we see in the ending. I'm not sure why, but for some reason Unit 01's green stripes turning red felt like the awesomest thing I had ever seen in my entire life. Least favorites are generally the cartoony things and out-of-place fanservice. One thing that I'm surprised hasn't been mentioned yet is Unit 01's "Gotta go FAST" scene when racing to Sahaquiel.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 6:31 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: -Asuka night-time crotch shot. lolwtf.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Sep 29, 2009 6:48 pm Anno's epic troll in the moment when we find out it wasn't indeed Toji that was going to pilot Unit-03. That troll moment will always have a place in my heart.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Tue Sep 29, 2009 7:39 pm Asuka piloting Unit 03 was great in concept, but the execution could've been better. And that scene with Shinji eating ice cream with Toji and Kensuke was totally pointless, especially if you already know that Toji's not piloting. Same goes for Toji picking up his sister in the hospital. Trolling's fine, but expending five minutes on an in-joke...

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Tue Sep 29, 2009 9:03 pm Lucretius wrote: Asuka piloting Unit 03 was great in concept, but the execution could've been better. And that scene with Shinji eating ice cream with Toji and Kensuke was totally pointless, especially if you already know that Toji's not piloting. Same goes for Toji picking up his sister in the hospital. Trolling's fine, but expending five minutes on an in-joke...
